# PHP Dependency Injection Benchmark

This repository benchmarks different dependency injection containers.

## Summary

| Container | Average | Minimum | Maximum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| laravel | 0.54603404998779 | 0.54275393486023 | 0.54781603813171 |
| nette-di | 0.0034932136535645 | 0.0033130645751953 | 0.0041100978851318 |
| php-di | 0.00092172622680664 | 0.00090193748474121 | 0.00097990036010742 |
| pimple | 0.069061803817749 | 0.068617105484009 | 0.069394826889038 |
| quickly-configured | 0.0040013313293457 | 0.0038528442382812 | 0.0042719841003418 |
| quickly-reflection | 0.0039520263671875 | 0.0038609504699707 | 0.0040771961212158 |
| symfony | 0.0025989532470703 | 0.0025629997253418 | 0.0026700496673584 |

## Test Results

Results from the latest automated run of the Dockerized benchmarks
(triggered on pushes to main and a monthly schedule):
